scripts.test:e2e:bypass:mem: NEXT_PUBLIC_AUTH_MODE=dev_bypass NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=${NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:${API_PORT:-4000}} npm run build -w @tw-portfolio/config -w @tw-portfolio/test-framework -w @tw-portfolio/test-e2e -w @tw-portfolio/web && npx playwright test --config=tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:oauth:mem: NEXT_PUBLIC_AUTH_MODE=oauth NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=${NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:${API_PORT:-4000}} npm run build -w @tw-portfolio/config -w @tw-portfolio/test-framework -w @tw-portfolio/test-e2e -w @tw-portfolio/web && [ -f ../../.env.local ] && set -a && . ../../.env.local && set +a; npx playwright test --config=tests/e2e/playwright.oauth.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:ci:bypass:mem: NEXT_PUBLIC_AUTH_MODE=dev_bypass NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=${NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:${API_PORT:-4000}} npm run build -w @tw-portfolio/config -w @tw-portfolio/test-framework -w @tw-portfolio/test-e2e -w @tw-portfolio/web && npx playwright test --config=tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts --reporter=junit
scripts.test:e2e:ci:oauth:mem: NEXT_PUBLIC_AUTH_MODE=oauth NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=${NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:${API_PORT:-4000}} npm run build -w @tw-portfolio/config -w @tw-portfolio/test-framework -w @tw-portfolio/test-e2e -w @tw-portfolio/web && npx playwright test --config=tests/e2e/playwright.oauth.config.ts --reporter=junit
